user.title: Marstek Local API V2
user.description: Searching for Marstek devices on your network...

discovery.title: Discovered Devices
discovery.description: Found {count} Marstek device(s). Select which to add.

manual.title: Manual Configuration
manual.description: No devices found automatically. Enter the IP address of your Marstek battery (find it in your router or the Marstek app).

name_devices.title: Device Names
name_devices.description: Set a friendly name for each device.

options_initial.title: Optional Settings
options_initial.description:
Configure optional settings for cost/revenue calculations and planning. You can change these later via Options.
{prefill_note}

data.electricity_price_entity: Electricity price sensor (€/kWh, all-in incl. taxes) – used for cost/revenue sensors
data.grid_power_entity: P1 meter power sensor (W) – grid active power, positive = importing from grid. E.g. sensor.p1_meter_xxxxx_active_power
data.market_price_entity: Market price sensor with hourly prices – sensor with 'prices' attribute (e.g. Nordpool or EPEX). Used for plan sensors.
data.procurement_fee: Procurement fee (€/kWh excl. VAT) – feed-in compensation from your supplier
data.plan_hours: Plan hours – number of charge/discharge hours per day
data.min_spread: Min spread (€/kWh) – minimum price difference for profitable charge/discharge

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Check the IP address and UDP port.
error.no_devices_selected: Please select at least one device.

data.electricity_price_entity: Electricity price sensor (€/kWh, all-in incl. taxes)
data.grid_power_entity: P1 meter power sensor (W) – grid active power, positive = importing
data.market_price_entity: Market price sensor with hourly 'prices' attribute (e.g. Nordpool/EPEX)
data.plan_hours: Plan hours (number of charge/discharge hours per day)
